turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I, uh, I need to know what payment options you accept at the clinic. I have a large bill coming up.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure! We accept cash, all major debit and credit cards, UPI payments including GPay, PhonePe and Paytm, and also net banking. For large bills, we also offer EMI options through select credit cards.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: EMI sounds good. Which cards support EMI at your place?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have EMI arrangements with HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank credit cards. The minimum transaction amount for EMI is ₹10,000 and tenures range from 3 to 12 months. There's no processing fee for 3-month EMI.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I have an HDFC card so that works. Is there any interest?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For 3-month EMI it's zero interest, and for longer tenures the interest rate varies by your card — HDFC will debit that directly. You'd need to confirm the exact rate with your bank.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Understood, that's really helpful. I'll choose EMI when I come in.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect! Just let our billing desk know when you arrive and they'll process it for you. Have a good day!
